title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
